title: Into the Storm
overview: 1914. Prince Alek of Austria-Hungary goes on an unusual practice session in a Stormwalker. In Edinburgh, Sharp eagerly takes flight in a Huxley.

title: Prelude to War
overview: As Europe teeters on the edge of an all-out war, Alek struggles with his new life in hiding. Sharp gets acquainted with the Leviathan and its crew.

title: Clankers and Darwinists
overview: Alek learns why he's hunted and, despite Volger's advice, sneaks out to aid the Leviathan's crew. He saves Sharp, who doesn't buy the prince's story.

title: The Weight of the Past
overview: With Clanker forces hot on their tail, the wounded Leviathan needs a miracle to get off the ground. Alek makes an offer the Darwinists can't refuse.

title: Far to the East
overview: The Leviathan encounters a deadly Clanker weapon on its journey towards Istanbul. Upon arriving in the city, Alek and his comrades make plans to escape.

title: Shadows of Istanbul
overview: Sharp and Dr. Barlow finally meet the Sultan, hoping to smooth things over with a rare gift. Meanwhile, a mysterious girl saves Alek from a German patrol.

title: Stormy Seas
overview: A patrol jeopardizes the British secret operation, forcing Sharp to flee into Istanbul's streets. Alek commits himself to the revolutionary army's cause.

title: Behemoth
overview: On the day of the coup, Alek urges Klopp to leave for his safety. Later, unexpected news forces the revolutionaries to act before the Behemoth arrives.

title: Tunguska
overview: The Leviathan and its crew arrive in Siberia to meet Barlow's uncle. He reveals the source behind numerous mysterious phenomena around the world.

title: Truth and Lies
overview: Tensions run high after Alek learns the truth about his friend. But before they can talk things over, Sharp gets into a dangerous predicament.

title: Goliath
overview: Determined to uncover the truth about Tunguska, Alek and Sharp confront Tesla and learn about the invention responsible for the destruction: the Goliath.

title: Under the Same Sky
overview: Tesla issues a deadly ultimatum as a last resort. Can Sharp and Alek, stuck on opposing sides, prevent the conflict from escalating before it's too late?
